imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Warm window-sill fashion editorial. Architecture: soft warm yellow house wall with simple rectangular open window with white wooden frame, clean white trim and believable interior depth. Subject: Adult woman wearing white satin midi slip dress with thin straps and fluid fabric, clean white over-ear headphones, holding loose bouquet of fresh yellow flowers. Pose: one leg extended outward and raised on the sill, other leg relaxed inside, one arm hanging freely, relaxed confidence, safe body geometry, natural hands and legs. Composition: Window frames the subject, vertical editorial crop, simple facade, flowers and wardrobe create the story. Light and Palette: late-afternoon golden light with soft house-wall shadows; warm yellow, white satin, fresh flower yellow, and pale sky blue. Style: Ultra-photoreal lifestyle fashion editorial, soft fabric, realistic skin, quiet summer mood. Restrictions: Adult only, no explicit pose, no distorted legs, no fake brand logos, no unsafe falling look, no random text.
